next_steps: Perform brain and spine MRI with and without gadolinium contrast to look for leptomeningeal enhancement or parasitic tracks.
Send CSF and serum for Angiostrongylus cantonensis and Gnathostoma spinigerum serology.
Perform CSF PCR for parasitic pathogens, including Angiostrongylus cantonensis.
Continue dexamethasone as it is standard of care for parasitic eosinophilic meningitis to mitigate inflammatory response to dying larvae.
Maintain broad-spectrum antibiotics until bacterial cultures are confirmed negative, then reassess antibiotic necessity.
Obtain detailed travel history regarding specific consumption of raw vegetables (for slugs/snails) versus raw seafood.
